name: DashMind AI
tagline: Conversational Analytics Engine for Real-Time Executive Intelligence
description: DashMind AI is a next-generation conversational business intelligence platform that converts natural language queries into dynamic multi-chart dashboards and strategic insights. Users can upload structured datasets such as CSV files and instantly generate KPI summaries, trend analysis, category comparisons, and growth intelligence without writing SQL or using traditional BI tools.
features: Conversational Dashboard Generation from Natural Language
Smart KPI Engine with Growth and Performance Metrics
Natural Filter Parsing (Time, Category, Numeric Conditions)
CSV Upload with Automatic Schema Detection
Offline Heuristic Analytics Engine (No External AI API Required)
Follow-up Query Support with Query History Context
Insight Engine with Trend and Stability Detection
capabilities: Extensible Design for ML Forecasting Integration
author: Mohammed Anaan
